title: MGN 559 (M+F) Amendment 2 Electromagnetic fields regulations 2016
body: "This notice should be read with the Merchant Shipping and Fishing Vessels (Health and Safety at Work) (Electromagnetic Fields) Regulations 2016 and replaces MGN 559 (M+F) Amendment 1.  Notice to all shipowners, employers, masters, seafarers, skippers and crew of fishing vessels "
